mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY dict_sort ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type = #{dictType} AND dict_label = #{dictLabel} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT dict_type FROM sys_dict_data WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY dict_type ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_dict_data WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY dict_sort ASC
